name: diag-edges-no-nodes
description: Hide node meshes via setPerfSettings nodesVisible=false. If multiple edges suddenly appear, they were hidden behind/inside nodes.

commands: (async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 800)); const r = window.__qualiaRenderer; r.setPerfSettings({ nodesVisible: false }); await new Promise(r2 => setTimeout(r2, 500)); return { nodesVisible: false }; })()
